query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_com_tarefa,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customTaskTitle IS NOT NULL AND customTaskTitle != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_titulo_custom,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_taskId_biblioteca,
  SUM(CASE WHEN (customTaskTitle IS NULL OR customTaskTitle = '') AND taskId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_nome_nenhum,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskMode IS NULL OR taskMode = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_taskMode,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskMode = 'sem_tarefa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as modo_sem_tarefa
FROM mentoring_sessions
WHERE taskStatus != 'sem_tarefa' AND taskStatus IS NOT NULL;

FROM mentoring_sessions
